assertions.assertion: Output calls .AddServerSideSessions() on the IdentityServer builder (not as an option property)
assertions.rationale: Response calls .AddServerSideSessions() on the builder chain.

Response does NOT set options.Authentication.CoordinateClientLifetimesWithUserSession to true. Instead, it mentions setting 'CoordinateLifetimeWithUserSession' on individual client configurations, which is a different (per-client) property, not the global options.Authentication setting required by the assertion.
